What about Surgery? Alternative snoring cures Sleep Apnea Treatment How do I get a Snorepro? FAQs Opportunities Contact Sleep Apnea Treatment Obstructive sleep apnoea (OSA), is caused by blocked airways in the throat. This is the most common type of sleep apnoea and affects as much as 4% of the normal population. Sleep apnea can look a bit like falling in love. Like that Top Gun theme, it takes your breath away. Your heart skips a beat and flutters erratically. You’re commonly seen rubbing your tired eyes after a long and… active night. Unfortunately, love doesn’t cure the reality of headaches, snoring, breathlessness and exhaustion. Sleep apnea might look like love, but there’s nothing lovely
